summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Situations (Progressive Billing / Factures de situation) feature. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with modal, tabs, slider, and situations section working correctly.

issues: The 'Déjà facturé' field shows a minus sign prefix which can be confusing when displaying the amount (shows '-5 478,00 €' instead of '5 478,00 €'). This is intentional design but may confuse users.

seed_data_creation: Created test quote with situations during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Situations feature fully tested. Two modes available: 'global' (same % for all items) and 'per_line' (different % per item). Quote DEV-2026-0003 has 3 situations at 80.46% progress. Quote DEV-2026-0001 has 1 acompte at 30%.

tests: ✓ POST /api/quotes/{id}/situation - global mode creates situation correctly
✓ POST /api/quotes/{id}/situation - per_line mode creates situation correctly
✓ GET /api/quotes/{id}/situations - lists all situations for a quote
✓ GET /api/quotes/{id}/situations/summary - returns correct summary with progress %
✓ POST /api/quotes/{id}/situation/final-invoice - creates décompte final
✓ Validation: % must be > previous cumulative %
✓ Validation: % cannot exceed 100%
✓ Validation: Quote must be in accepte/envoye status
✓ Validation: per_line mode requires line_items
✓ Validation: global mode requires global_percentage
✓ Final invoice requires at least one situation
✓ 404 returned for non-existent quote
✓ 401/403 returned without authentication
✓ Situation invoices appear in invoices list with is_situation=true
✓ Situation button (green, with HardHat icon) visible on quote detail page
✓ Button only visible when quote status is 'accepte' or 'envoye'
✓ Button labeled 'Situation'
✓ Modal opens when clicking Situation button
✓ Modal title: 'Créer une situation de travaux'
✓ Summary section shows: Total du devis, Avancement actuel, Déjà facturé, Restant
✓ Tabs: '% Global' and 'Par ligne'
✓ Global tab: Slider for percentage, input field, quick buttons (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
✓ Global tab: Preview shows 'Cette situation' and 'Après cette situation'
✓ Per ligne tab: Individual sliders for each quote line item
✓ Référence chantier field (optional)
✓ Notes field (optional)
✓ Buttons: Annuler, Créer la situation
✓ 'Situations de travaux' section visible on quote detail page when situations exist
✓ Progress bar showing 'Avancement du chantier' with percentage
✓ List of situations with: invoice number, cumul %, type (global/par ligne), amount TTC, status
✓ Each situation is clickable (links to invoice detail)
✓ Summary: Total facturé, Reste à facturer
✓ 'Nouvelle situation' button when remaining > 0
✓ 'Décompte final' button when progress >= 100%
✓ HT/TVA/TTC amounts correctly calculated based on percentage
✓ Cumulative percentage tracked correctly across situations
✓ Remaining amount calculated correctly (quote total - situations total)
✓ Per-line mode calculates weighted average for overall progress

mocked_apis_list: Email sending (Resend API - test key re_123_test)
